name: Beany Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1 can 1-lb kidney beans; rinsed and drained
3 tbsp Dried bread crumbs or Germ
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the beans, rice, ketchup, and spices.
2. Mash with a fork or potato masher until the beans are well mashed (the rice will be lumpy).
3. Add the remaining ingredients and mix well.
4. Divide the mixture evenly and form into 8 burgers, each about 1/2 to 3/4-inch thick.
5. Wet your hands slightly to avoid sticking.
6. Lightly oil a nonstick griddle or skillet, or spray with a nonstick cooking spray.
7. Preheat over medium heat.
8. Place the burgers on the griddle and cook until browned on both sides, about 15 minutes. Turn the burgers several times while cooking.
